items.title: Trade, Iran and Taiwan on the agenda as Trump arrives in China for high-stakes talks with Xi
items.summary: The US president says his first request to Xi would be to  "open up" China, while Beijing is expected to press Trump on the status of Taiwan.

items.title: Watch: What happened on day one of Trump's China visit?
items.summary: China welcomed US President Donald Trump with cheering children and a troop parade on Thursday, before a nearly two-hour long meeting with Xi-Jinping.

items.title: Court overturns Alex Murdaugh's murder convictions and orders new trial
items.summary: The court has ordered a new trial over the June 2021 killings of Paul and Maggie Murdaugh.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 澤倫斯基前左右手涉貪 億元交保喊「我沒有那麼多錢」
items.summary: 烏克蘭總統澤倫斯基的前左右手、曾權傾一時的總統府幕僚長葉爾馬克（Andriy Yermak），被控涉貪，14日付不出法院裁定的高額保釋金，遭到拘留。  葉爾馬克在俄羅斯入侵...…

items.title: CNN揭美中角力30年劇變  「3個T」唯一沒變是這道紅線
items.summary: 美國總統川普與中國國家主席習近平14日在北京舉行峰會之際，長期採訪美中關係的CNN北京分社社長Steven Jiang撰文指出，美中角力的核心議題，已從30年前的人權與民主問題...…

items.title: 習近平身高之謎案外案！ 作家對比完得結論：連勝文必有210公分......
items.summary: 中國國家主席習近平的身高一直被外界視為「最想知道的秘密」之一，因為每當他與其他政治人物合照時，總是能「看起來」差不多高，作家蕭瑩燈在臉書分析，如果以白宮醫師公布的美國總統川普身高...…
